description: Create an automated data processing pipeline using SNAP's Graph Processing Tool (GPT) by authoring a processing graph XML file at /home/ga/snap_exports/band_ratio_graph.xml and executing it. The graph must sequence a Read node for /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif, a BandMaths node to compute a target band named 'ndvi' using the expression (band_2 - band_3) / (band_2 + band_3), and a Write node to save the output as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/nd_index_output.tif. Execute the graph using the gpt utility (/opt/snap/bin/gpt) and redirect all output to /home/ga/snap_exports/gpt_execution.log.
